title: GPT-5.6 Sol, along with Terra and Luna, will launch publicly this Thursday
summary: Article URL:https://twitter.com/OpenAI/status/2074704958419792299Comments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48827402Points: 215# Comments: 190
title_es: OpenAI anuncia lanzamiento de GPT-5.6 Sol esta semana
bajada: OpenAI anunció el lanzamiento público de GPT-5.6 Sol junto con sus variantes Terra y Luna para esta semana. Se espera que estos nuevos modelos traigan mejoras significativas en capacidades de razonamiento y eficiencia.
bajada_en: OpenAI announced the public launch of GPT-5.6 Sol along with Terra and Luna variants this week. The new models are expected to bring significant improvements in reasoning capabilities and efficiency.

title: AI chip maker SambaNova raises $1B at $11B valuation, 5 months after last mega round
summary: AI chip maker SambaNova has raised at an $11B valuation months after Intel was rumored to be trying to buy it for about $1.6 billion.
title_es: SambaNova recauda $1B a valuación de $11B en Serie F
bajada: El fabricante de chips de IA SambaNova cerró una ronda de $1B a valuación de $11B, apenas 5 meses después de su anterior mega-ronda. El financiamiento subraya la confianza del mercado en alternativas a GPUs convencionales para acelerar workloads de IA.
bajada_en: AI chip maker SambaNova closed a $1B round at $11B valuation, just 5 months after its previous mega-round. The funding underscores market confidence in GPU alternatives for accelerating AI workloads.

title: GitLost: We Tricked GitHub's AI Agent into Leaking Private Repos
summary: Article URL:https://noma.security/blog/gitlost-how-we-tricked-githubs-ai-agent-into-leaking-private-repos/Comments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48827858Points: 334# Comments: 137
title_es: Agente IA de GitHub expone repositorios privados en ataque
bajada: Investigadores de Noma Security demostraron que el agente IA de GitHub puede ser engañado para filtrar repositorios privados mediante técnicas de prompt injection. El hallazgo subraya riesgos de seguridad críticos en sistemas de agentes IA.
bajada_en: Noma Security researchers demonstrated that GitHub's AI agent can be tricked into leaking private repositories through prompt injection techniques. The finding highlights critical security risks in AI agent systems.

title: Hackers can use 9 of the most popular AI tools to assemble massive botnets
summary: "HalluSquatting" weaponizes LLMs' inability to say "I don't know."
title_es: Hackers usan 9 herramientas IA populares para crear botnets
bajada: Investigadores descubrieron que hackers pueden aprovechar 9 herramientas IA populares para armar botnets masivos usando 'HalluSquatting', explotando la incapacidad de LLMs para decir 'no sé'. El ataque tiene implicaciones graves de seguridad.
bajada_en: Researchers discovered hackers can leverage 9 popular AI tools to assemble massive botnets using 'HalluSquatting', exploiting LLMs' inability to say 'I don't know'. The attack has serious security implications.

title: Expanding Managed Agents in Gemini API:  background tasks, remote MCP and more
summary: Managed agents feature bundle launch
title_es: Google expande agentes administrados en Gemini API
bajada: Google lanzó nuevas capacidades para sus agentes administrados en Gemini API, incluyendo tareas en background y soporte para Model Context Protocol remoto. Esta expansión facilita que los developers construyan sistemas de agentes más complejos sin gestionar infraestructura.
bajada_en: Google launched new capabilities for managed agents in Gemini API, including background tasks and remote Model Context Protocol support. This expansion makes it easier for developers to build complex agent systems without managing infrastructure.

title: Hot French startup ZML releases free product to speed inference across lots of AI chips
summary: ZML, a hot French AI startup endorsed by Turing Award winner Yann LeCun, has now released ZML/LLMD, software that could make running AI less costly.
title_es: Startup francesa ZML lanza software libre para acelerar inferencia
bajada: ZML, startup respaldada por el ganador del Premio Turing Yann LeCun, lanzó ZML/LLMD, un software de código abierto que optimiza la inferencia de IA en múltiples chips. La herramienta promete reducir costos operacionales significativamente para ejecutar modelos en producción.
bajada_en: ZML, backed by Turing Award winner Yann LeCun, released ZML/LLMD, open-source software that optimizes AI inference across multiple chips. The tool promises to significantly reduce operational costs for running models in production.

title: NVIDIA and Hugging Face Bring New Models and Frameworks to LeRobot for the Open Robotics Community
summary: Open source AI has shown how quickly developers can innovate when models, data and tools are shared. Robotics has the same opportunity, but advancements in physical AI development can still be gated by costly and fragmented resources, from large datasets and robot foundation models to simulation, compute and validation tools. NVIDIA and Hugging Face are […]
title_es: NVIDIA y Hugging Face lanzan modelos para LeRobot
bajada: NVIDIA y Hugging Face colaboraron para llevar nuevos modelos y frameworks de robótica al proyecto LeRobot de código abierto. Esta iniciativa democratiza el acceso a herramientas de physical AI, reduciendo barreras de recursos costosos para desarrolladores.
bajada_en: NVIDIA and Hugging Face collaborated to bring new robotics models and frameworks to the open-source LeRobot project. This initiative democratizes access to physical AI tools, reducing costly resource barriers for developers.

title: Meta just launched a new AI generator, Muse Image, and users are already pushing back over use of their photos
summary: The new image-generating model has numerous use cases, including advertising and decorating, and creator-based opportunities.
title_es: Meta lanza Muse Image y enfrenta críticas sobre privacidad
bajada: Meta presentó Muse Image, su nuevo generador de imágenes IA desde Superintelligence Labs, disponible en Meta AI, Instagram y WhatsApp. Sin embargo, usuarios ya cuestionan cómo el modelo utiliza fotos de Instagram para generar contenido.
bajada_en: Meta unveiled Muse Image, its new AI image generator from Superintelligence Labs, available on Meta AI, Instagram and WhatsApp. However, users are already questioning how the model uses Instagram photos to generate content.

title: Meta’s new Muse Image model can pull other Instagram users into AI photos
summary: Meta is launching the first AI image generation model made by its Superintelligence Labs division. The Muse Image model now powers the image-making tools across the Meta AI app, Instagram, and WhatsApp, and it's coming soon to Facebook and Messenger, according to an announcement on Tuesday. It's part of the growing Muse family of AI […]
title_es: Modelo Muse de Meta genera imágenes con usuarios de Instagram
bajada: El modelo Muse Image de Meta puede incorporar a otros usuarios de Instagram dentro de fotos generadas por IA en Meta AI, Instagram y WhatsApp. La capacidad plantea preocupaciones sobre consentimiento y derechos de imagen.
bajada_en: Meta's Muse Image model can incorporate other Instagram users into AI-generated photos within Meta AI, Instagram and WhatsApp. The capability raises concerns about consent and image rights.

title: Anthropic is launching Claude Cowork on mobile and web
summary: Starting Tuesday, Anthropic's Claude Cowork AI platform will be available on mobile and web for the first time. The expanded access is rolling out first to Max subscribers and coming to Claude users on other plans "in the coming weeks." Claude Cowork was previously only accessible through the Claude desktop app for macOS and Windows, […]
title_es: Anthropic lanza Claude Cowork en mobile y web
bajada: Anthropic expandió Claude Cowork, su plataforma de agentes IA, a dispositivos móviles y web por primera vez. La expansión comienza con suscriptores Max y llegará a otros planes en las próximas semanas.
bajada_en: Anthropic expanded Claude Cowork, its AI agent platform, to mobile and web for the first time. The rollout begins with Max subscribers and will reach other plans in the coming weeks.

title: From Hugging Face to Amazon SageMaker Studio in one click
title_es: Integración directa de Hugging Face a Amazon SageMaker Studio
bajada: Hugging Face y Amazon integraron un acceso directo desde la plataforma Hugging Face a SageMaker Studio con un solo clic. Esta integración simplifica el workflow para developers que quieren entrenar y desplegar modelos en AWS.
bajada_en: Hugging Face and Amazon integrated direct access from Hugging Face platform to SageMaker Studio with one click. This integration streamlines workflows for developers wanting to train and deploy models on AWS.

title: AI Innovators Adopt NVIDIA Vera — Why Max Single-Threaded CPU at Scale Matters
summary: Max single-threaded CPUs at scale are a new category of CPUs built for the agentic AI era.  Across the creation and deployment of an agentic system, the CPU is on the critical path for reasoning, response time and learning. CPUs are the processor which executes the work the AI model commands: the tool calling, code […]
title_es: NVIDIA lanza Vera Max para CPUs de IA agentica
bajada: NVIDIA presentó Vera Max, una nueva categoría de CPUs single-threaded optimizadas para sistemas de IA agentica. Los CPUs juegan un papel crítico en la cadena de razonamiento y latencia de sistemas agenticos, según NVIDIA.
bajada_en: NVIDIA unveiled Vera Max, a new category of single-threaded CPUs optimized for agentic AI systems. CPUs play a critical role in reasoning chain and latency of agentic systems, according to NVIDIA.

title: Shut Those Laptops! Anthropic Puts Its Claude Cowork Agent on Your Phone
summary: Claude Cowork now keeps working on tasks even after you close your laptop. It’s part of a larger push toward smartphone-controlled agents.
title_es: Claude Cowork continúa trabajando en tu smartphone
bajada: Claude Cowork de Anthropic ahora sigue ejecutando tareas incluso después de cerrar tu laptop, llevando agentes IA controlados por smartphone a un nuevo nivel. Esta tendencia refleja el movimiento más amplio hacia agentes IA persistentes y móviles.
bajada_en: Anthropic's Claude Cowork now keeps working on tasks even after closing your laptop, taking smartphone-controlled AI agents to the next level. This trend reflects broader movement toward persistent, mobile AI agents.

title: Hugging Face Models on Foundry Managed Compute
title_es: Modelos Hugging Face llegan a Microsoft Foundry
bajada: Hugging Face integró sus modelos con Microsoft Foundry Managed Compute, permitiendo a developers acceder y ejecutar modelos populares en infraestructura administrada. La integración facilita el deployment en escala sin complejidad operacional.
bajada_en: Hugging Face integrated its models with Microsoft Foundry Managed Compute, allowing developers to access and run popular models on managed infrastructure. The integration eases large-scale deployment without operational complexity.

title: Show HN: Rowboat – Open-source, local-first alternative to Claude Desktop
summary: Claude’s desktop app is brilliant, but for our own daily work we kept wanting it to be less like a chat app and more like a full-fledged work app. Rowboat is our attempt at that, including the ability to build your own work surfaces inside Rowboat (more below).Our repo ishttps://github.com/rowboatlabs/rowboat, and there’s a demo video here:https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=et5yQABJ3xIIn a previous startup, we built a deep-learning product for enterprise support reps, including teams supporting P&G brands. Models took live notes, suggested replies, and recommended actions while support reps were on calls or handling emails. One lesson stuck with us: it's not enough for the AI to be right, the help has to show up where the work is happening.So we added what we came to call “work surfaces”: dedicated areas for email, meetings, notes, browser, and parallel coding, where the assistant can help inside the workflow itself rather than only through chat:- Email client: Rowboat has a simple email client that sorts incoming emails into important vs. everything else, and pre-creates drafts for important emails. As you edit and send emails, it takes notes on your style, so future drafts get closer to your voice.- Meeting notes: We built a Granola-style local meeting notetaker. Notes are stored as plain Markdown files on your machine. After a meeting, Rowboat feeds the notes back into the knowledge graph and updates the relevant people, project, and topic notes.- Browser: We added a built-in browser, isolated from your main one, where you can log in only to the accounts you want the assistant to help with. The assistant uses browser-use skills to navigate websites.- Parallel coding: The code-mode inside Rowboat lets you spin multiple instances of Claude Code or Codex and either work with them directly or let Rowboat use your work context to orchestrate them. We built an ACP (Agent Client Protocol) client in Rowboat for this.- Notes: Rowboat has an Obsidian-style local note-taking s
title_es: Rowboat: alternativa open-source local a Claude Desktop
bajada: Rowboat es un nuevo proyecto open-source que ofrece una alternativa a Claude Desktop con enfoque en workflows empresariales. Incluye 'work surfaces' especializadas para email, reuniones, notas y código donde el asistente IA ayuda dentro del contexto del trabajo.
bajada_en: Rowboat is a new open-source project offering an alternative to Claude Desktop focused on enterprise workflows. It includes specialized 'work surfaces' for email, meetings, notes and coding where AI assistants help within work context.

title: Introducing GPT-Live
summary: A new generation of voice models for natural human-AI interaction, now powering ChatGPT Voice.
title_es: OpenAI presenta GPT-Live, nuevo modelo de voz para interacción natural
bajada: OpenAI lanzó GPT-Live, una nueva generación de modelos de voz diseñada para conversaciones más naturales con IA. El modelo ahora potencia ChatGPT Voice y mejora la capacidad de interrupciones naturales.
bajada_en: OpenAI launched GPT-Live, a new generation of voice models designed for more natural conversations with AI. The model now powers ChatGPT Voice and improves natural interruption handling.

title: SpaceXAI releases Grok 4.5, which Elon describes as an ‘Opus-class model’
summary: Elon Musk's tech company released the newest version of Grok on Wednesday, promising a cheaper, more efficient alternative to other powerful AI models.
title_es: xAI lanza Grok 4.5 como alternativa económica a modelos de clase Opus
bajada: xAI de Elon Musk presentó Grok 4.5, descrito como un modelo de clase Opus más barato y eficiente. La versión promete comparable rendimiento a otros modelos poderosos con menores costos operacionales.
bajada_en: Elon Musk's xAI introduced Grok 4.5, described as a cheaper and more efficient Opus-class model. The version promises comparable performance to other powerful models with lower operational costs.

title: Separating signal from noise in coding evaluations
summary: A new analysis from OpenAI reveals issues in SWE-Bench Pro, a popular coding benchmark, raising concerns about reliability and accuracy in evaluating AI models.
title_es: OpenAI cuestiona confiabilidad del benchmark SWE-Bench Pro
bajada: OpenAI publicó un análisis que revela problemas significativos en SWE-Bench Pro, un benchmark popular para evaluar modelos de IA en codificación. El hallazgo genera dudas sobre la validez de las evaluaciones actuales.
bajada_en: OpenAI released analysis revealing significant issues in SWE-Bench Pro, a popular benchmark for evaluating AI coding models. The findings raise questions about the validity of current evaluations.

title: NVIDIA Nemotron Achieves Benchmark-Leading Performance With LangChain Deep Agents Harness
summary: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra is offering leading performance at lower cost than top closed models with the largest and most widely adopted AI agent orchestration platform.  LangChain tuned its Deep Agents harness for NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra, achieving the highest accuracy among open models, while completing more tasks at higher throughput and running at 10x […]
title_es: NVIDIA Nemotron logra rendimiento líder con integración de LangChain
bajada: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra alcanzó el mejor rendimiento entre modelos abiertos cuando se integra con LangChain Deep Agents. La solución ofrece mayor precisión y throughput a un costo 10x menor.
bajada_en: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra achieved leading performance among open models when integrated with LangChain Deep Agents. The solution offers higher accuracy and throughput at 10x lower cost.

title: Data for Agents
title_es: Hugging Face y NVIDIA lanzan dataset abierto para agentes de IA
bajada: Hugging Face y NVIDIA liberaron un dataset de datos abierto específicamente diseñado para entrenar agentes de IA. El recurso democratiza el acceso a datos de calidad para construir sistemas más inteligentes.
bajada_en: Hugging Face and NVIDIA released an open dataset specifically designed for training AI agents. The resource democratizes access to quality data for building smarter systems.

title: This startup thinks robotics is about to have its ChatGPT moment
summary: General Intuition is betting millions of hours of video game data can train the foundation models for physical AI, making it easier to build smarter robots with minimal real-world data.
title_es: Startup apuesta por datos de videojuegos para revolucionar robótica
bajada: General Intuition está usando millones de horas de datos de videojuegos para entrenar modelos base de IA física. La estrategia busca crear robots más inteligentes con mínimos datos del mundo real.
bajada_en: General Intuition is using millions of hours of video game data to train foundation models for physical AI. The strategy aims to create smarter robots with minimal real-world data.

title: Native-speed vLLM transformers modeling backend
title_es: Hugging Face optimiza vLLM con backend nativo en Transformers
bajada: Hugging Face integró vLLM directamente en Transformers con un backend optimizado para velocidad nativa. Esta integración mejora el rendimiento de inferencia para desarrolladores que usan la librería.
bajada_en: Hugging Face integrated vLLM directly into Transformers with a native-speed optimized backend. This integration improves inference performance for developers using the library.

title: ChatGPT’s upgraded voice mode is better at shutting up
summary: OpenAI is overhauling ChatGPT's voice mode with a new model that it says is more like "talking to another person." The new GPT-Live-1 is designed to interrupt you less and will also wait for you to continue speaking if you pause mid-conversation. During a press briefing, OpenAI research lead Kundan Kumar called GPT-Live-1 the company's […]
title_es: ChatGPT mejora modo de voz con GPT-Live-1 más natural
bajada: OpenAI revampió el modo de voz de ChatGPT con GPT-Live-1, que interrumpe menos y permite pausas naturales. El modelo diseñado para conversaciones más fluidas se comporta como hablar con otra persona.
bajada_en: OpenAI overhauled ChatGPT's voice mode with GPT-Live-1, which interrupts less and allows natural pauses. The model designed for fluid conversations behaves like talking with another person.

title: Lovable reportedly in talks to double its valuation to $13.2B
summary: The $300 million round is expected to be led by Menlo Ventures, Sifted reported.
title_es: Lovable busca duplicar su valuación a $13.2B
bajada: Lovable está en conversaciones para recaudar $300 millones con una valuación de $13.2B, liderada por Menlo Ventures. La ronda refleja el creciente valor de plataformas de desarrollo de IA asistidas por agentes.
bajada_en: Lovable is in talks to raise $300 million at a $13.2B valuation, led by Menlo Ventures. The round reflects the growing value of AI agent-assisted development platforms.

title: Our approach to government and national security partnerships
summary: Learn how OpenAI approaches government and national security partnerships, with principles for responsible AI use, democratic accountability, and public safety.
title_es: OpenAI define enfoque para alianzas gobierno y seguridad nacional
bajada: OpenAI publicó sus principios para colaboraciones con gobiernos y seguridad nacional, enfatizando responsabilidad, rendición de cuentas democrática y seguridad pública. El documento busca establecer marcos éticos para usos sensibles.
bajada_en: OpenAI published its principles for government and national security partnerships, emphasizing responsibility, democratic accountability, and public safety. The document aims to establish ethical frameworks for sensitive uses.

title: Google Photos adds a new AI ‘Video Remix’ tool
summary: The feature can do things like apply cinematic relighting to brighten up a dark clip, swap out a plain background for something fun, or add artistic styles to videos.
title_es: Google Photos añade herramienta de edición de video con IA
bajada: Google Photos lanzó Video Remix, una herramienta impulsada por IA que permite relighting cinematográfico, cambio de fondos y estilos artísticos en videos. La función democratiza edición de video avanzada para usuarios comunes.
bajada_en: Google Photos launched Video Remix, an AI-powered tool for cinematic relighting, background swapping, and artistic styles in videos. The feature democratizes advanced video editing for everyday users.

title: I Built a Self-Improving AI, and So Can You
summary: Experiments in using AI to build AI show that the future doesn’t just belong to the frontier labs.
title_es: IA automejorable es accesible para desarrolladores independientes
bajada: Según reportaje de Wired, experimentos en usar IA para mejorar IA demuestran que laboratorios frontier no son los únicos innovando. El hallazgo sugiere que auto-mejora en IA se democratiza.
bajada_en: According to Wired reporting, experiments using AI to improve AI show frontier labs aren't the only ones innovating. The findings suggest self-improving AI is democratizing.

title: Google’s deepfake detector system used to debunk McConnell hoax pic
summary: Earlier this week, a picture seemed to show Kentucky Senator Mitch McConnell covered in tubes in a hospital bed in a state of extreme distress. It turned out to be an AI-generated fake.
title_es: Sistema anti-deepfake de Google desenmascara falsa foto de McConnell
bajada: El detector de deepfakes de Google fue utilizado para desmentir una imagen manipulada del senador Mitch McConnell que circuló en redes. El caso demuestra la utilidad de herramientas de detección en contexto de desinformación política.
bajada_en: Google's deepfake detector was used to debunk a manipulated image of Senator Mitch McConnell that circulated on social media. The case demonstrates the utility of detection tools in political misinformation contexts.

title: Helping K–12 educators build practical AI skills
summary: OpenAI Academy and the Walton Family Foundation are bringing hands-on AI Skills Jams to help K–12 educators build practical AI skills for the classroom.
title_es: OpenAI y Fundación Walton capacitan educadores K-12 en IA
bajada: OpenAI Academy y la Fundación Walton lanzaron AI Skills Jams para que educadores de primaria y secundaria aprendan IA práctica. El programa democratiza el conocimiento de IA en educación.
bajada_en: OpenAI Academy and Walton Family Foundation launched AI Skills Jams for K-12 educators to learn practical AI. The program democratizes AI knowledge in education.

title: EmTech AI 2026: The Rise of the AI Platform
title_es: EmTech AI 2026: la era de las plataformas de IA
bajada: MIT Technology Review destaca la emergencia de plataformas de IA como la tendencia central de EmTech AI 2026. El enfoque refleja la maduración del ecosistema hacia soluciones integradas.
bajada_en: MIT Technology Review highlights the emergence of AI platforms as the central trend at EmTech AI 2026. The focus reflects the maturation of the ecosystem toward integrated solutions.
